title: Electroloon stuns opposing creatures while on field

plan.providerWarning: No WARD_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY found. The app will use local fallback plans until a server key is configured.

card.rawText: All creatures on the opposing side of the field are stunned and cannot inflict Atk damage. At the beginning of their turn, they may roll 1 die. If the result is 1-2, this effect ends.

effect.durationText: Until escape roll succeeds or source leaves field

plan.title: Electroloon stuns opposing creatures while on field
plan.summary: Place Electroloon on the field and verify opposing creatures are stunned and cannot inflict Atk damage while the aura is active.

notes: Pre-place Electroloon as player_1 primary creature on field.
Place an opposing creature as player_2 primary creature.
Electroloon text: opposing creatures are stunned and cannot inflict Atk damage.

steps: Build the field with Electroloon opposing a creature.
Inspect player_2 primary creature status and attack damage flag.

expectedAssertions.label: Opposing creature is stunned by Electroloon
Opposing creature cannot inflict Atk damage
Status aura runtime route emitted evidence

manualVerification: Confirm the stun is source-linked and ends when Electroloon leaves the field or the escape roll succeeds.
riskNotes: This fixture intentionally checks both the visible status and the attack-damage prevention flag.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_006_electroloon-006-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
